name: domain-fusion-companies
description: Use web_search to search for 'private fusion companies Commonwealth Fusion TAE Helion funding milestones'. Same fusion articles will appear. List the top 3 private fusion companies and their approach. One sentence each. Keep response under 100 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer: Commonwealth Fusion Systems (~$3B raised) is building SPARC, a compact high-field tokamak using HTS magnets, targeting net energy by 2027 and a commercial ARC plant in Virginia in the early 2030s with a 200 MW Google power purchase agreement. TAE Technologies (~$1.8B raised, merged with Trump Media in a $6B deal) pursues aneutronic hydrogen-boron fusion using field-reversed configuration, planning a utility-scale Da Vinci plant grid-ready in the early 2030s. Helion Energy (~$1B raised, backed by Sam Altman) uses a pulsed field-reversed configuration approach and has begun constructing its 50 MW Orion reactor in Washington state under the world's first fusion power purchase agreement with Microsoft, targeting 2028 delivery.
key_facts: CFS has raised ~$3 billion and is building SPARC, a compact tokamak using HTS magnets
TAE Technologies pursues aneutronic hydrogen-boron fusion and merged with Trump Media in a $6B deal
Helion has the world's first fusion power purchase agreement with Microsoft for 50 MW by 2028
CFS secured a 200 MW power purchase agreement with Google for its ARC plant
Helion began construction of its Orion reactor in Washington state in 2025
